title: Make money during bear with Felix on $HYPE
summary_title: 70% APR from liquidations: Felix Protocol's stability pool on Hyperliquid
summary_description: CDP stablecoin with revenue-sharing liquidations. Deposit FEUSD, earn yield plus hype collateral discounts.

key_moments.label: Felix launching tomorrow with mint cap increase to 5M
Stability pool yielding ~70% APR from liquidation rewards
Aaron introduces Felix co-founders' DeFi risk background at Anthias
Why FEUSD stablecoin: filling gap before native USDC/USDT arrives

pull_quote: The stability pool depositors get the first right to buy liquidated collateral and receive the 5% penalty clipped from the borrower.
